notes: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 Forbidden. This most likely indicates WebFetch is being blocked by bot-protection/CDN (Cloudflare or similar) rather than actual site downtime — all sites failing simultaneously makes a true outage unlikely. Treat as check_inconclusive for availability; investigate manually if concerned. SSL alert is genuine: all certs expire 2026-05-19 (29 days), below the 30-day warning threshold. converge-refresh.vercel.app added to monitoring today (8th site).
